zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth於1377年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Philip Darcy25歲，母親Elizabeth Grey22歲。他於大約1397年與Margaret Grey在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1411年12月9日在英國越可爾坦普爾 赫斯特享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾塞爾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth于1377年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Philip Darcy25岁，母亲Elizabeth Grey22岁。他于大约1397年与Margaret Grey在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1411年12月9日在英国越可爾坦普爾 赫斯特享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾塞爾比。

nameMeanings.name: D'Arcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth was born in 1377, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Philip Darcy, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Grey, was 22. He married Margaret Grey about 1397, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 9 December 1411, in Temple Hirst, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Selby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth est né en 1377, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip Darcy, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Grey, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Grey environ 1397, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 9 décembre 1411, à Temple Hirst, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Selby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth 1377 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip Darcy 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Grey 22. Er hat um 1397 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Dezember 1411 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Temple Hirst, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Selby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth è nato il nel 1377 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Philip Darcy, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Grey, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Grey circa 1397, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 dicembre 1411, nel Temple Hirst, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Selby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John D'Arcy of Knaythが1377年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Philip Darcyは25歳，母Elizabeth Greyは22歳であった。約1397年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでMargaret Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年12月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアテンプル ヒルストで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアセルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth(이)가 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip Darcy(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Grey(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Margaret Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년 12월 9일 영국 요르크실르 템일 허스트에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셀비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth nasceu em 1377, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Philip Darcy, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Grey, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Grey aproximadamente 1397, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1411, em Temple Hirst, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Selby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth родился в 1377 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Philip Darcy было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Grey, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Grey около 1397 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 9 декабря 1411 г. в местности темпл хирст, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности селби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth nació en 1377, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Philip Darcy, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Grey, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Grey aproximadamente 1397, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1411, en Temple Hirst, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Selby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
